items.meaning: rock/soil altered by exposure and breakdown
items.example: Weathered volcanics observed near the brow.
Open joint with seepage noted along left wall.
items.note: Use with aperture estimate where possible

items.content: Localized ravelling observed beneath the overbreak edge.
items.note: Reusable observation sentence for shift reports

items.content: Detached blocks can indicate progressive instability when crack width is increasing.
